programme.desc: The three new sets of hosts of "Happy Long Stay" will lead the audience to visit Kaohsiung from different aspects and angle to ensure audiences will have a different perspective and interests in Kaoshiung.

programme.title: My Sassy Wedding - EP 25
programme.desc: KunPa MeiKe and Kun MoWei are arrested while trying to escape. HaiYong contracted a strange illness and is on the verge of death.

programme.title: My Sassy Wedding - EP 26
programme.desc: Bandit XiCai leads a group of men to attack TongAi City. KunPa ShanMing and Kun YiLing bravely lead the others to defend TongAi City.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Why Her? - EP 7
programme.desc: Oh Soo-jae is a talented lawyer who gets caught up in an unexpected case. At law school, she meets the student Gong Chan, who falls in love with her and would do anything to protect her.

programme.title: Singer 2025 - EP 8
programme.desc: The lineup of Singer 2025 once again features renowned artists from the Greater China region and beyond. The featuring singers include: Mickey Guyton, Beni, Shan Yi Chun, Terry Lin, Zhou Yan, Janice Vidal, Joyce Cheng, Christine Fan, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: Passed by Censor
programme.desc: In an Istanbul prison, Zakir is tasked with reading and censoring the letters inmates receive. Tasked with a writing assignment for his night class, Zakir uses a photograph of an inmate's wife for inspiration, but fantasy soon morphs into delusion.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: To My Beloved
programme.desc: Fernando is a good man who takes care of his only child, Daniel. Following the death of his wife Ana, every night Fernando recalls their love as he sorts out his beloved dead spouse’s belongings. One day he finds a VHS tape that will change everything.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Room 514
programme.desc: When Anna, a young, idealistic Israeli military investigator, confronts an elite officer with accusations of unnecessary violence against a Palestinian man in the Occupied Territories, her integrity and determination are challenged.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone
programme.desc: When Eva returns to her house on the day of her divorce, she finds a bouquet of red roses outside the door. Attached is the note: "You are not alone." The sender is anonymous.

programme.title: Future is a Lonely Place
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his family’s death, Frank stages a crime and turns himself in to infiltrate a prison drug ring. Frank aims to get close to the man responsible for their death, and forms a dangerous bond with a guard along the way.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Risks And Side Effects
programme.desc: When Pilates trainer Kathrin needs a new kidney, her husband’s hesitation to be her donor results in a crisis in their marriage. Faced with issues of life and death, the fragility of the couple’s relationship is laid bare.

programme.title: Breathing Underwater
programme.desc: When Emma has to leave her picture-perfect life for a women's shelter, covered in bruises and unexpectedly pregnant, her unlikely friendship with a ragtag group of women pushes them all into a fight to take back their power.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows The Detective And The Fear
programme.desc: When Inspector Martin Brühl awakens in the morning, he is alarmed by partner Susanne Koch’s absence. Unbeknownst to him, Susanne witnessed a crime on her nightly walk home. Critically injured in an ATM explosion, she was kidnapped by the perpetrators.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Union, a group of Estonian students go hiking in Siberia. After their unpopular leader Olle vanishes, his rival Eero leads the group to seek help, and a series of bizarre and terrifying events unfold.

programme.title: Midnight At The Paradise
programme.desc: Over the course of one evening, three couples are pulled into a collision course of sexual chemistry, delusion, forgiveness and hope as they explore what love, death, desire and the magic of the movies mean to them.

programme.title: Moon's Walking
programme.desc: On the day of her grandmother’s memorial, 16-year-old Jung-hee escapes a volatile home and goes on a journey in search for the truth behind her grandfather’s disappearance.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: A fatal car crash shudders a crisis-torn family. Completely lost and shaken to the core by his wife’s death, the husband undertakes his own investigation and learns the shattering truth about his spouse’s genuine woes and longings.

programme.title: A Murder Of Crows The Detective And The Fear
programme.desc: When Inspector Martin Brühl awakens in the morning, he is alarmed by partner Susanne Koch’s absence. Unbeknownst to him, Susanne witnessed a crime on her nightly walk home. Critically injured in an ATM explosion, she was kidnapped by the perpetrators.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Enersto, a hunting guide in Patagonia, is left to take care of his teenage son he hasn’t seen for years. An intense father-son relationship is played out amidst the hostility of nature.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Laras was pressured to express his decision to live without children when his in-laws asked him to adopt a child because he was deemed unable to produce offspring.

programme.title: Ghost Mountaineer
programme.desc: In the former Soviet Union, a group of Estonian students go hiking in Siberia. After their unpopular leader Olle vanishes, his rival Eero leads the group to seek help, and a series of bizarre and terrifying events unfold.

programme.title: Tokyo Fianc
programme.desc: A charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery. Amélie, a Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with Rinri, a Francophile Japanese student.

programme.title: The Daval Mystery
programme.desc: Jonathann Daval reports the disappearance of his wife Alexia after she fails to return from her morning jog. Over the next three months, the police will launch the most relentless investigation into a media saga that will shake the whole of France.

programme.title: Victoria Must Go
programme.desc: Hedvig and Henrik's new stepmother Victoria is annoying and constantly introducing new rules. They decide to hire a hitman to get rid of her, and end up persuading a very reluctant immigrant, Carl, to do the job.

programme.title: Train Driver's Diary
programme.desc: As Ilija nears retirement, his record of unintentional deaths as a train driver weighs heavy. His adopted son, Sima, fears following in his footsteps. But as days pass without incident, Ilija's determination to ensure Sima's success takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Midnight At The Paradise

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day. Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑，富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白，采用先进脱膻技术，保留营养与纯净口感，连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用。 还特别添加叶黄素、胶原蛋白和 Omega-3，支持眼睛、关节及心脑血管健康。每天两杯，补钙增强免疫力，适合全家饮用，特别适合年长人士，助力骨骼健康与活力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set

Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm

A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 21
programme.desc: Warna Ramadan

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 17
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 18
programme.desc: Qaisara discovers she is pregnant and Azizi worries their child may inherit his autism. Fatimah uses the pregnancy as a reason to move back into Azizi’s home, sparking renewed tension with Kak Ila.

programme.title: Wanita Syurga - EP 8
programme.desc: Ardini advises Firdaus not to hurt Hanis' feelings, while Farah grows interested in Amar and seeks to get closer to him.

programme.title: 7 Hari - EP 8
programme.desc: 10 years after Shahrils disappearance in a plane crash, Kamilah has ready to move on and accepts Adams proposal. 7 days before their marriage, Adam meets Shahril. Shahril wants to look for his family but Adam says he is of no help. Kamilah finds out that Adam is keeping her from meeting Shahril.

programme.title: Jalan Ampas - EP 2
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 21
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Masih Ada Yang Peduli - EP 3
programme.desc: Over two million people live on islands in the Brahmaputra river, Assam. Boat clinics are their only access to healthcare. Dr Noor takes on the impossible task of saving their lives.

programme.title: Riuh-Riuh Ramadan S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: With Kassim and Rogayah missing, everyone spiral into worry and guilt, except Muna. Everyone scrambles to find them before Raya. Misunderstandings cleared, emotional apologies unfold, and the families reunite. With Has & Kass successfully saving the community event, the neighbourhood celebrates a joyful Double Riuh Raya, complete with beautiful raya clothes, tightly-woven ketupat nd heartfelt forgiveness.

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 39
programme.desc: Kathy grows fearful of losing Alisya when she learns that Zara has returned to the neighbourhood. While Riqmal and Kathy are away on their honeymoon, Zara attempts to take Alisya with her.

programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 22
programme.desc: One last home to visit, one final reminder before Syawal. In the finale of Warna Ramadan, Ustaz Nuzhan reflects on the meaning of Raya in SEMBANG, Hans Hamid and his wife share family styling and photo tips in GAYA, and HIDANG surprises viewers with a final celebrity home stop. CABAR sees Seri and Mastura completing their mission as the season comes to a close.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 18
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 19
programme.desc: Qaisara’s pregnancy enrages Farouk, who fears the child will inherit Azizi’s wealth and pressures her to end it. Meanwhile, it is revealed that Budi has been faking his illness to secretly report back to Tuan Ishak.

programme.title: (Live) Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Famili Yang Popular - EP 1
programme.desc: A family of influences obsessed with the glitz of social media has their world shattered when one of them is diagnosed with cancer. In the face of reality that no filter can hide, will they unite to confront this challenge together or will fame and facade tear them apart?

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2026 is a festive homecoming like no other—uniting an orchestral experience with laugh-out-loud Raya skits, as beloved homegrown stars return to honour their roots. Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Aroma Syawal
programme.desc: In 'AROMA SYAWAL,' a daughter's love and her father's fading memory rekindle through the aroma of cherished recipes, unveiling family secrets and the enduring Hari Raya spirit.

programme.title: Aroma Syawal
programme.desc: In 'AROMA SYAWAL,' a daughter's love and her father's fading memory rekindle through the aroma of cherished recipes, unveiling family secrets and the enduring Hari Raya spirit.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Ghazali moved back to his hometown with his wife and step child because he was transferred to a nearby school. His return is not welcomed by his mother. In addition, Ghazali still carries a grudge against his neighbour, Wak Tarjo because of an incident.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 2
programme.desc: Helmi does not want to stay with his parents at their new home. The relationship between Nek Munah and her step grandchild, Badriah is better. However, Nek Munah still does not accept the existence of her daughter-in-law, Leha in her life.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 3
programme.desc: Due to Wak Tarjo's accident, the villagers work together to clean the big drain. Omar also starts his own business to compete with his father. Meanwhile, Helmi causes another accident in the village.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 4
programme.desc: The villagers work hard to get ready for Raya even though the water levels are rising. Harianto insists on bringing Helmi back to his flat after another problem arises. On the night of Raya, Ghazali did not return home.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 5
programme.desc: The heavy rain has fallen and many places have been flooded. The villagers are forced to flee to a safer place. However, they worry if their homes will be safe while trying to find their missing family members.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 1
programme.desc: Two weeks before Ramadan starts, Ratna and Farah attend a relatives wedding and bump into an old ex-university mate, Stanley, who is now a Muslim convert. Around the same time, both are asked to lead teams to help fund raise at Ustaz Umars' Insan for a Ramadan project. This year also marks the first Ramadan since the death of the cousins grandmother. Farah's mother, Maria, reminds her siblings to continue with their late mum's family traditions.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 2
programme.desc: Abdullah (Stanley) invites Ratna and Farah to join a weekend online religious class. Maria notices Mardiana is distracted and reminds her to not to be too preoccupied with trivial stuff and instead stay focussed on Ramadan. Maria resolves to stay away from social media for one month. At Insan, Ratna decides to 'take charge' and her behaviour is not welcomed by Farah.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S9 - EP 6
programme.desc: In the 9th season of Upin and Ipin, the boys are excited to play with Tok Dalang's little chicks. They learn about different kinds of books as their homework and overcoming the dengue fever spread over Kampung Durian Runtuh.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 18
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: JMJ Magika Raya
programme.desc: After a quarrel with her mum on the eve of Raya, a young girl steps into a magical world of Malay legends. Will she be able to get back to the real world, seek forgiveness and celebrate Raya?

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2026 is a festive homecoming like no other—uniting an orchestral experience with laugh-out-loud Raya skits, as beloved homegrown stars return to honour their roots. Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Ubi Superstar Raya
programme.desc: Get ready for a Raya celebration like no other with Ubi Superstar Raya! Packed with hilarious sketches, catchy musical parodies and plenty of festive cheer. This comedy stage special brings together the funniest highlights of Ubi for non-stop laughs.

programme.desc: "Zaman Sekolah" is a nostalgic journey back to the cherished days of schooling, where life-long memories and foundations were built. Each episode dives deep into the heart of what school life meant for our celebrity guests who return to their alma maters to relive and share their most poignant and formative experiences.

programme.title: Saat Hilang Tong Gas Mu
programme.desc: Azal works tirelessly, driving trucks during the day and selling bundles online at night after Azrina's parent request a dowry of RM20,000 for their marriage. When his lorry is stolen, he manages to recover it, but discovers that 200 gas cylinders worth RM20,000 are missing. With the wedding just a month away, Azal must find the money or risk losing Azrina.

As Hari Raya approaches, Eid, struggles to finish the orders. In addition, she has to restore her reputation that is ruined by an unhappy customer's viral video.
